What We Handle

Legal Services in Kanpur

From criminal to civil — experienced legal representation across all practice areas at Civil Court, Kanpur

⚖️
Criminal Law

Bail applications, anticipatory bail, FIR matters, police cases, sessions court trials, and High Court appeals. Expert defence at every stage.

View details →
🏠
Property Disputes

Land disputes, illegal possession, encroachment, registry issues, partition cases, and urgent stay orders and injunctions.

View details →
👪
Divorce & Family Law

Mutual consent divorce, contested divorce, maintenance under Section 125, child custody and matrimonial property disputes.

View details →
📄
Civil Cases

Money recovery suits, injunctions, contract disputes, civil suits, and execution proceedings at District Court level.

View details →

Other Services: Cheque Bounce (Sec. 138 NI Act)  ·  Consumer Disputes  ·  Rent & Tenancy  ·  Writ Petitions  ·  Anticipatory Bail  ·  Power of Attorney  ·  Legal Notices  ·  Labour Disputes

Have a different matter? Call: +91 93695 66101 →

Why Clients Trust Us

Why Choose Advocate Kashyap?

🎯
Personal Attention

Every case is handled individually with dedicated focus. You receive guidance specific to your situation — not generic advice.

⚡
Fast Legal Response

Bail applications, stay orders, urgent hearings — handled without delay. Time-sensitive cases are always the priority.

🔎
Transparent Process

Updates at every stage — hearing dates, strategy, honest expectations. No hidden fees, no surprises, ever.

💪
Strong Representation

10+ years of active practice at Civil Court Kanpur Nagar. Deep understanding of local court dynamics and procedures.

About the Advocate

Advocate Dharmendra Kumar Kashyap

Advocate Dharmendra Kumar Kashyap, son of Shri Babu Lal Kashyap, is a dedicated legal professional enrolled in the Bar Council of Uttar Pradesh since 20th November 2015 (Enrollment No. UP07044/15). His Certificate of Practice (C.O.P. No. R1-160371 / 2025) is valid and current.

With over 10 years of active practice at Civil Court, Kanpur Nagar, he has built extensive experience across criminal, property, divorce, and civil cases. His approach is straightforward: listen carefully, advise honestly, and represent strongly.
